title: [kimi-review] 7e34aa1: [SEVERITY: high] **The claimed fix is not in this commit.**
description:
Commit: 7e34aa1a0
Message: fix(node): add bounds check for OSCORE PIV extraction

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] **The claimed fix is not in this commit.** The commit message says "add bounds check for OSCORE PIV extraction" and references `secure.rs:194`, but the diff only touches an issue-tracker JSON file. No change to `secure.rs` (or any source file) is included. If the bounds check is not already present in the code, the slice panic on malformed OSCORE options (a remotely triggerable DoS via a crafted CoAP message) remains unfixed while the issue is marked closed.
